basicDetails.schemeName: Taluka Level Personality Development and Yogasan Training Camp for Scheduled Caste

nodalDepartmentName.label: Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme "Taluka Level Personality Development and Yogasan Training Camp for Scheduled Caste" aims to provide personality development and Yogasana training to Scheduled Caste youths through free residential training camps held at the taluka level across the state.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Taluka Level Personality Development and Yogasan Training Camp for Scheduled Caste" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to facilitate holistic personality development—physical, mental, and spiritual—among Scheduled Caste youth aged between 14 and 35 years by organizing 7-day free training camps. These camps are conducted across all 250 talukas in 41 Scheduled Caste-majority districts of Gujarat and are designed to empower 50 youth participants per taluka through structured personality enhancement and Yogasana sessions.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Personality Development:** Participants undergo structured sessions for enhancing communication, confidence, discipline, and overall character. - **Physical Development:** Daily Yogasana training and exercises aimed at physical fitness. - **Mental and Spiritual Development:** Yoga and related practices to foster mental peace and spiritual well-being.

children.text: The scheme "Taluka Level Personality Development and Yogasan Training Camp for Scheduled Caste" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to facilitate holistic personality development—physical, mental, and spiritual—among Scheduled Caste youth aged between 14 and 35 years by organizing 7-day free training camps. These camps are conducted across all 250 talukas in 41 Scheduled Caste-majority districts of Gujarat and are designed to empower 50 youth participants per taluka through structured personality enhancement and Yogasana sessions.
Participants undergo structured sessions for enhancing communication, confidence, discipline, and overall character.
Daily Yogasana training and exercises aimed at physical fitness.
Yoga and related practices to foster mental peace and spiritual well-being.
The interested applicant should download the prescribed format of the application form.
In the application form, provide all the mandatory details, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the supporting documents to the office of the District Youth Development Officer.
Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The interested applicant should download the prescribed format of the application form. **Step 2:** In the application form, provide all the mandatory details, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attested, if required). **Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the supporting documents to the office of the District Youth Development Officer. **Step 4:** Request a receipt or acknowledgement from the concerned authority to whom the application has been submitted.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat. - The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste category. - The applicant should be between 14 and 35 years of age.

children.text: The applicant should be a resident of Gujarat.
The applicant should belong to the Scheduled Caste category.
The applicant should be between 14 and 35 years of age.
